title: LSQWRF130/C Cooling Capacity
summary: Rated cooling capacity 130 kW, power 46.4 kW, COP 2.8, 8 compressors, water flow 23 m³/h, R22 charge 42 kg.

title: E01 Flow Switch Fault
summary: Flow switch fault: host detects flow switch signal OFF for 6s after pump runs 30s; stops all modules; non-recoverable, requires power cycle.

structured_payload.condition: 主机检测，水泵开启30s后连续6s测量流量开关信号为“OFF”
structured_payload.recovery: 不可恢复故障，必须断电排除故障后重新启动

evidence_quote:
E01  流量开关故障
判断条件：主机检测，水泵开启30s后连续6s测量流量开关信号为  “OFF”；
故障处理：停所有模块；
故障恢复：该故障为不可恢复故障，必须断电排除故障后重新启动。

title: E05 Phase Loss Protection
summary: Three-phase input phase loss; stops all compressors, pump, fans; auto-recovery when input normal.

structured_payload.description: 三相交流电输入缺相保护
structured_payload.action: 停所有压缩机、水泵、风机
structured_payload.recovery: 交流电输入正常后，自动恢复

evidence_quote:
E05   三相交流电输入缺相保护
判断条件：三相交流电输入缺相；
故障处理：停所有压缩机、水泵、风机（若主机出现此故障，停所有模块，从机出现此故障，则只停对应模块机）；
故障恢复：交流电输入正常后，自动恢复。

title: E22 A System High Pressure Protection
summary: A system high pressure switch HP1 open; stops A system compressor; auto-recovery when HP1 closes.

structured_payload.condition: A系统高压开关HP1处于断开状态

evidence_quote:
E22     A 系统高压保护
判断条件： A系统高压开关 HP1处于断开状态；
故障处理：停 A系统压缩机 ；
故障恢复： HP1信号闭合后恢复。

title: E24 Compressor 1 Overcurrent
summary: Compressor 1 overcurrent: IAC1 ≥17.5A; stops A system compressor; auto-recovery.
evidence_quote:
E24  压机 1过电流保护
判断条件： I AC 1≥17.5A；
故障处理：停 A系统压机；
故障恢复：自恢复。

title: Defrost Time Setting Range
summary: Defrost time adjustable from 5 to 16 minutes via controller.
evidence_quote:
除霜时间 :    08
除霜间隔 :    ——
除霜进入温度 :  -5℃
除霜退出温度 :  17℃

title: Cooling Return Water Temperature Setting Range
summary: Cooling mode return water target temperature adjustable from 10°C to 25°C.

title: Heating Return Water Temperature Setting Range
summary: Heating mode return water target temperature adjustable from 25°C to 55°C.

title: DIP Switch Address Setting for Module 0 (Host)
summary: DIP1-4 all ON sets module as host (address 0).

structured_payload.setting: DIP1 ON, DIP2 ON, DIP3 ON, DIP4 ON

evidence_quote: ON    ON    ON    ON   主机 0

title: DIP Switch Model Setting for 186 Unit
summary: DIP6 ON, DIP7 ON, DIP8 ON selects 186 model.

structured_payload.setting: DIP6 ON, DIP7 ON, DIP8 ON
